title: Department Manager Vacancy at Zara India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Zara India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Zara India Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Zara India Digital Technologies:
Zara India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zara India Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
